llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDE/FC - SAP Consultant (m/f/d)
job.description: Responsibilities: You will be responsible for ensuring the operation and project delivery across all phases you will execute business requirements engineering and ensure provisioning of standard IT features - You will do error analysis and corrections of Incident and Problems (Provide 2nd and/or 3rd level support). - As part of our agile development team you will work on user stories, do the development and testing of new features. - With your extensive experience on the subject matter, you will guide, coach and train other team members build competencies for the respective modules. - You will be assigned projects where you will have end to end responsibility for all deliverables Qualifications: - Strong functional expertise in SAP GLM, including system customizing, table structures, and underlying data models. - A technical background in ABAP is an advantage, enabling effective analysis and an end‑to‑end solution perspective. - Proven experience in the design, implementation, and operation of SAP labeling processes, including incident analysis, root‑cause investigation, and issue resolution. - Strong collaboration and communication skills to align with internal stakeholders (e.g. SAP Warehouse Management, Site Logistics, Global Label Governance teams) as well as external service providers within the SAP labeling landscape. What we offer: Be part of a global leader in digital transformation, working in a vibrant Digital Hub that values innovation, agility, and cross-functional collaboration. Shape the future of BASF’s digital landscape, contributing to projects that drive sustainability and make a real impact. Thrive in a high-performance culture that supports your personal and professional growth, offering diverse learning opportunities and career development. Enjoy a modern, inclusive work environment where your ideas are valued, and your curiosity and ambition are encouraged. Benefit from flexible working models, international networking, and a strong sense of purpose as we enable our customers’ green transformation and lead the way in digital excellence. [to include specific local benefits]. Profession / Occupation / Studies: 'Completed university degree in Business IT, Business Economics, Information Science, Engineering, or Natural Science,
